shared_properties: The portrait uses a 64x64px frame, a fur hood silhouette, and a braided beard readable at 1x scale.
Core palette fields remain fixed at primary #111111, background #000000, and accent #FFFFFF.
The portrait stays anchored to the upper-left HUD zone so winter-state feedback remains stable.
differences: This base asset shows the composed command expression used during low-blizzard planning turns.
The beard and hood move through a restrained 4-frame idle cycle that reads as breathing rather than panic.
White rim light stays narrow so the portrait remains clear over dense black HUD panels.

reference_images.label: jarl_of_blizzard_gdd
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the winter survival loop, queue-memory mechanic, building roster, and 1920x1080 Bevy target.

reference_images.label: jarl_of_blizzard_player_jarl
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the jarl portrait silhouette, fur hood shape, and beard readability in a compact HUD footprint.

reference_images.label: jarl_of_blizzard_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the monochrome blizzard mood, Viking settlement silhouettes, and snow density targets.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: TextureAtlas-backed HUD portrait sprite rendered as a fixed screen-space entity in the top-left corner.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/art_000001.png during UI boot and keep the atlas handle in a portrait state resource keyed by task_id.
runtime_notes: Advance the idle loop at 2fps so expression changes stay readable during planning and result screens.
Keep the portrait pivot locked to the upper-left safe area to avoid jitter during overlay transitions.
Use nearest-neighbor sampling and whole-pixel placement so beard strands and hood trim remain crisp.

context.usage: Default portrait state shown while the village is planning a winter allocation queue under manageable weather.

shape.silhouette: Compact hooded bust with a square shoulder crop, bright brow edge, and dark beard mass.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 256x64px with 4 frames of 64x64px and 0px spacing.
Eyes, nose bridge, and beard edge remain readable at 1x scale on a 1920x1080 HUD.
Only the listed grayscale values plus transparency appear in the exported PNG.
